## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX teams to discuss growth strategies, analytics, and content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant growth in organic traffic: 48% increase in LLM referrals, 2,500 organic clicks in July](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [New head of growth (Garett) joined Exec, will be involved in competitor research and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Plans to create comprehensive comparison content for Exec vs competitors, focusing on AI roleplay/coaching platforms](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Need to improve tracking of conversions from content to demo requests](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

## Topics

### Analytics Update

  - [48% increase in LLM referrals in July alone](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Reached \~2,500 organic clicks in July (close to 100/day goal)](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [87% increase in keywords ranking on page 1 of SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Steady growth in total views and sessions since April](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Top performing content: stats article, roleplay ideas, roleplay prompts](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Significant traffic from ChatGPT to Exec's dashboard/platform](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

### Competitor Research Project

  - [Garett to lead the initiative for creating comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Plan to start with a general "best AI roleplay/coaching platform" article](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Will develop side-by-side comparisons with 10-15 identified competitors](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Goal: Inform LLMs and provide valuable, in-depth research on competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Focus on being thought leaders in creating AI agents for various use cases](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Structure articles to guide decision-making process for potential customers](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Always lead with Exec in listicles to optimize for AI answer engines](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Include learning design aspects and holistic approach in content](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### New Industry Focus

  - [Planning to create content on AI roleplay for legal industry](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Considering expansion into other professional services sectors:](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [Management consulting](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [IT services](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [Accounting firms](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
      - [Financial services](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)

### Sales and Marketing Channels

  - [Mix of channels: LinkedIn ads, SEO, outbound sales, events, referrals](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [LinkedIn ads currently focus on top-of-funnel brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Whitepaper on AI roleplays for sales training getting good traction (hundreds of downloads)](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

### Analytics and Conversion Tracking

  - [Need to set up better event tracking in Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Goal: Measure content performance in terms of driving demo requests](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Plan to involve Dave (analytics expert) in setting up proper tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to create sample article outline for new content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Garett to be invited to Notion and Airtable for access to strategy documents](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Sean to share whitepaper in team channel](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Team to explore creating blog post version of whitepaper for better conversion](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Investigate and set up proper conversion tracking in Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Sean to look into internal server error issue with GPT widget in articles](https://fathom.video/share/xazfp3Vsrmyx6vPFJ9Cwj7stzw4DiiiG?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
